title: MkDocs Configuration
description: Schema for the MkDocs project configuration file (mkdocs.yml). Defines all settings that control site metadata, navigation, themes, plugins, Markdown extensions, and build behavior for generating static documentation sites.

site_name.description: The main title for the project documentation site. This required setting is passed as the site_name context variable when rendering the theme.

site_url.description: The full canonical URL where the documentation will be hosted. Used to add a canonical link tag to each HTML page and to configure the dev server mount path.

site_description.description: A description for the documentation project added to the HTML meta tags.

site_author.description: The name of the author added to the HTML meta tags.

repo_url.description: URL to the source repository (GitHub, Bitbucket, GitLab, etc.). When set, provides a link to the repository on each documentation page.

repo_name.description: Display name for the repository link. Defaults to 'GitHub', 'Bitbucket', or 'GitLab' when the repo_url matches those domains, otherwise uses the hostname.

edit_uri.description: Path from repo_url to the docs directory for direct page editing links. Automatically set for known hosts (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket). Set to empty string to disable.

edit_uri_template.description: More flexible alternative to edit_uri using Python format strings. Supports {path}, {path_noext}, and {path!q} (percent-encoded). Mutually exclusive with edit_uri.

docs_dir.description: The directory containing the documentation Markdown source files.

site_dir.description: The output directory where the generated static site files will be written.

copyright.description: A copyright notice to add to the footer of documentation pages.

nav.description: Defines the navigation structure of the documentation site as a list of title-to-path mappings or nested sections.

exclude_docs.description: Gitignore-style patterns of files relative to the docs directory to exclude from the site build.

draft_docs.description: Gitignore-style patterns of files relative to the docs directory to mark as drafts. Draft pages are excluded from production builds.

not_in_nav.description: Gitignore-style patterns of files relative to the docs directory that are intentionally not included in the nav (suppresses warning log messages).

theme.description: The MkDocs theme configuration. Can be a string theme name or an object with theme name and options.

dev_addr.description: The IP address and port for the local development server started by mkdocs serve.

use_directory_urls.description: When true, generates page_name/index.html style URLs. When false, generates page_name.html style files. True generates cleaner URLs.

strict.description: When true, enables strict mode which stops the build on warnings rather than continuing.

remote_branch.description: The remote branch to commit to when deploying with mkdocs gh-deploy.

remote_name.description: The remote name to push to when deploying with mkdocs gh-deploy.

extra_css.description: List of additional CSS files from the docs directory to include in the generated site.

items.description: Path to a CSS file relative to the docs directory.

extra_javascript.description: List of additional JavaScript files from the docs directory to include in the generated site. Items can be strings or script objects with defer/async attributes.

oneOf.description: Path to a JavaScript file relative to the docs directory.

extra_templates.description: List of additional Jinja2 HTML or XML template files to build with the global context.

markdown_extensions.description: List of Python-Markdown extension names or extension configuration objects to enable. Built-in extensions (toc, tables, fenced_code) are always enabled.

oneOf.description: Extension name mapped to its configuration options.

plugins.description: List of MkDocs plugins to use during the build. Each item is either a plugin name string or a mapping of plugin name to its configuration options.

oneOf.description: Plugin name as registered via the mkdocs.plugins entry point group.
Plugin name mapped to its configuration options.

hooks.description: List of Python script filenames to import as plugin instances. Hooks allow local plugin-like customization without packaging.

items.description: Path to a Python script file to use as a hook.

watch.description: Additional paths to watch for changes during mkdocs serve (triggers live reload).

extra.description: A mapping of arbitrary data passed to the Jinja2 template context. Allows theme authors to require extra configuration data without explicit MkDocs support.

validation.description: Configuration for MkDocs validation warnings emitted during the build.

NavItem.description: A navigation item which can be a list of title-to-path mappings or nested sections.

oneOf.description: A navigation entry mapping a display title to a page path or a nested list of nav items.
Path to the Markdown file relative to the docs directory.

ThemeConfig.description: Full theme configuration object specifying theme name and theme-specific options.

name.description: The theme name. Use null to use a custom theme without a base theme.

custom_dir.description: Path to a directory of custom theme overrides. Files here override corresponding theme files.

static_templates.description: List of templates to render as static pages even without a corresponding Markdown source.

locale.description: The locale (language code) for theme localization, e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'de'.

language.description: Alias for locale used by some themes.

ExtraScript.description: A JavaScript file reference with optional loading attributes.

path.description: Path to the JavaScript file relative to the docs directory.

defer.description: When true, adds the defer attribute to the script tag.

async.description: When true, adds the async attribute to the script tag.

type.description: The type attribute for the script tag (e.g., 'module').

ValidationConfig.description: Controls validation behavior and warning levels during site builds.

omitted_files.description: Warning level when a doc file is never mentioned in the navigation.

not_found.description: Warning level when navigation links to a relative path that does not exist as a page.

absolute_links.description: Warning level when navigation links to an absolute path starting with /.

LinksValidationConfig.description: Validation settings for in-page Markdown links.

not_found.description: Warning level when a Markdown doc links to a relative path that does not exist.

absolute_links.description: Warning level when a Markdown doc links to an absolute path starting with /.

unrecognized_links.description: Warning level when a Markdown doc links to a relative path that does not look like a valid internal link (e.g., ends with /).

anchors.description: Warning level when a Markdown doc links to an anchor not present on the target page.
